caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black headset with an attached microphone is positioned against a plain, neutral-colored wall. In the first frame, he is speaking with his hands raised slightly, gesturing with closed fists. By the second frame, he looks downward with a neutral facial expression, his hands lowered out of view. In the third frame, he looks forward again and opens his arms wide in an expansive gesture. In the final frame, his mouth is open as he continues to speak, and his arms move slightly inward. The text "Ashish Raichur" appears in the bottom left corner of every frame. The camera remains stationary throughout the sequence, capturing the man from the chest up.
